diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -22,46 +22,24 @@
 class CLIPVitClassifier(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, num_classes=100):

         super(CLIPVitClassifier, self).__init__()

-        # Load pre-trained CLIP ViT-Base model (this is already downloaded)

+        # Load pre-trained CLIP ViT-Base model

         self.backbone = timm.create_model('vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai', pretrained=True)

         

-        # Get original patch embedding parameters

-        orig_patch_embed = self.backbone.patch_embed

-        

-        # Create new patch embedding for 32x32 input

-        self.backbone.patch_embed = timm.models.vision_transformer.PatchEmbed(

-            img_size=32, patch_size=4, in_chans=3, embed_dim=768

-        )

-        

-        # Interpolate positional embeddings from original size to new size

-        # Original: 224x224 -> (224/16)^2 + 1 = 197 (196 patches + 1 class token)

-        # New: 32x32 -> (32/4)^2 + 1 = 65 (64 patches + 1 class token)

-        orig_pos_embed = orig_patch_embed.pos_embed  # Shape: [1, 197, 768]

-        

-        # Extract spatial positional embeddings (excluding class token)

-        orig_spatial_pos_embed = orig_pos_embed[:, 1:, :]  # Shape: [1, 196, 768]

-        orig_spatial_pos_embed = orig_spatial_pos_embed.transpose(1, 2).view(1, 768, 14, 14)  # [1, 768, 14, 14]

-        

-        # Interpolate to new grid size (8x8 for 32x32 with patch_size=4)

-        new_spatial_pos_embed = F.interpolate(orig_spatial_pos_embed, size=(8, 8), mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

-        new_spatial_pos_embed = new_spatial_pos_embed.view(1, 768, 64).transpose(1, 2)  # [1, 64, 768]

-        

-        # Combine with class token positional embedding

-        new_cls_pos_embed = orig_pos_embed[:, 0:1, :]  # [1, 1, 768]

-        new_pos_embed = torch.cat([new_cls_pos_embed, new_spatial_pos_embed], dim=1)  # [1, 65, 768]

-        

-        # Update positional embeddings

-        self.backbone.pos_embed = nn.Parameter(new_pos_embed)

+        # Freeze the backbone initially

+        for param in self.backbone.parameters():

+            param.requires_grad = False

         

         # Get the number of features from the backbone

         num_features = 768  # CLIP ViT-B/16 has 768 features

-        # Remove the original head

-        self.backbone.head = nn.Identity()

         

-        # Add cosine classifier

+        # Replace the head with our classifier

         self.classifier = CosineClassifier(num_features, num_classes)

         

     def forward(self, x):

-        features = self.backbone(x)

+        # Use the backbone to extract features

+        features = self.backbone.forward_features(x)

+        # Take the mean of patch embeddings (excluding class token) if needed

+        if features.dim() == 3:

+            features = features.mean(dim=1)  # Average over sequence dimension

         logits = self.classifier(features)

         return logits
